---
title: "Daft Punk Tribute"
pagetitle: "Daft Punk Tribute"
---

```{=html}
<div style="
  display: flex; 
  flex-direction: column; 
  align-items: center; 
  justify-content: center; 
  min-height: 70vh; 
  text-align: center; 
  padding: 2rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a1a 0%, #2d2d2d 50%, #1a1a1a 100%);
  color: #ffffff;
  font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
">
  
  <div style="
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 1.5rem 3rem;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #4ecdc4 50%, #45b7d1 100%);
    border-radius: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.3);
    transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(5deg);
  ">
    <h1 style="
      margin: 0; 
      font-size: 2.5rem; 
      font-weight: bold; 
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
      background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff6b6b, #4ecdc4, #45b7d1);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    ">DAFT PUNK</h1>
  </div>
  
  <div style="
    width: 80px;
    height: 80px;
    border: 4px solid;
    border-image: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff6b6b, #4ecdc4) 1;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    animation: pulse 2s infinite, rotate 4s linear infinite;
  ">
    <div style="
      width: 30px;
      height: 30px;
      background: linear-gradient(45deg, #ff6b6b, #4ecdc4);
      border-radius: 50%;
    "></div>
  </div>
  
  <p style="
    font-size: 1.3rem; 
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    opacity: 0.9;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
  ">Around the World</p>
  
  <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FGBhQbmPwH8&list=RDFGBhQbmPwH8&start_radio=1" 
     id="redirectButton"
     style="
       display: inline-block;
       padding: 1.2rem 3rem;
       font-size: 1.1rem;
       font-weight: bold;
       color: white;
       background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #4ecdc4 50%, #45b7d1 100%);
       border: none;
       border-radius: 50px;
       text-decoration: none;
       cursor: pointer;
       box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.4);
       transition: all 0.3s ease;
       text-transform: uppercase;
       letter-spacing: 1px;
       position: relative;
       overflow: hidden;
     "
     onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-3px) scale(1.05)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 8px 25px rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.6)';"
     onmouseout="this.style.transform='translateY(0) scale(1)'; this.style.boxShadow='0 6px 20px rgba(255, 107, 107, 0.4)';">
    
    <span style="position: relative; z-index: 1;">🎵 Listen Now →</span>
  </a>
  
  <p style="margin-top: 2rem; font-size: 0.9rem; opacity: 0.7;">
    Press the button below to experience the music
  </p>
  
  <p style="margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.8rem; opacity: 0.6;">
    Ready to get lucky? Click the button to continue! 🎵
  </p>
  
  <div style="
    margin-top: 3rem;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    opacity: 0.5;
    font-style: italic;
  ">
    "One More Time... Harder, Better, Faster, Stronger"
  </div>
</div>

<style>
@keyframes pulse {
  0% { transform: scale(1); }
  50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
  100% { transform: scale(1); }
}

@keyframes rotate {
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

#redirectButton::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: -100%;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.3), transparent);
  transition: left 0.5s;
}

#redirectButton:hover::before {
  left: 100%;
}
</style>

<script type="text/javascript">
  // Button click will handle the redirect automatically via the href attribute
  // No automatic redirect - user must click the button
</script>
```

::: {.callout-note}
## Update This Redirect

To change where this page redirects:

1. Edit this file: `daftpunk.qmd`
2. Find the line: `<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FGBhQbmPwH8..."`
3. Replace the URL with your new destination
4. Commit and push to GitHub
:::
